children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system
children.behavior: Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, and store in patients data store
postconditions: patient record created in patients data store

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient details including name, age, contact, medical_history

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient_id, and message

global_vars.description: Write new patient record to patients data store

constraints.description: Patient ID must be unique across all patients
Input patient_data must contain all required fields (name, age, contact)

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is successfully written to patients data store
Returned patient_id is unique and non-null

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient
children.behavior: Validate patient exists, check appointment slot availability, and store appointment in appointments data store
postconditions: appointment record created in appointments data store

inputs.name: appointment_data
inputs.description: Appointment details including patient_id, doctor, date, time

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment_id, and message

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence

constraints.description: Appointment slot must not overlap with existing appointments for the same doctor
Patient must exist in patients data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record is successfully written to appointments data store
Returned appointment_id is unique and non-null

children.name: GetRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a registered patient
children.behavior: Validate patient exists, fetch records from patients data store (append-only), and return them

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, records list, and message

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence and retrieve records

constraints.description: Patient must exist in patients data store
Records must be returned as a list (may be empty)

acceptance_criteria.description: Records are successfully retrieved from patients data store
Returned records list is accurate and complete

children.name: UpdateProfile
children.purpose: Update profile information for a registered patient
children.behavior: Validate patient exists, update patient profile fields in patients data store
postconditions: patient profile updated in patients data store

inputs.name: update_data
inputs.description: JSON with patient_id and fields to update (e.g., contact, address)

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, updated profile, and message

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence and write updated fields

data_operations.description: Read patient record for existence check and write updated profile fields

constraints.description: Patient must exist in patients data store
Only specified fields in update_data are modified; other fields remain unchanged

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile is successfully updated in patients data store
Returned updated_profile reflects the changes correctly

governance_notes: All children operate on the patients data store (read/write) and appointments data store (write only for BookAppointment). No child requires capabilities beyond patients.read, patients.write, appointments.write. The parent orchestrates routing based on command type. Ensure atomicity for write operations and validation for existence checks.
